element_introduction_order.element: Basic blob matching (4+ same-colored blobs touching)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation for all subsequent puzzle solving
Required to generate rocks and pressure opponents

element_introduction_order.element: Rock mechanics (falling rocks that fill opponent screen)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Strategic depth - timing chains to maximize rock pressure

element_introduction_order.element: Rock clearing requirement (blobs must touch rocks to remove them)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Once rocks first appear on player screen
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defensive puzzle solving - managing space while clearing rocks
Later opponents generate larger chains and send more rocks

element_introduction_order.element: Boss encounters (Whispy Woods, Kracko, Meta Knight, King Dedede)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Highest difficulty opponents require expert chain management

typical_relief_triggers: Creating chain reactions to send rocks to opponent
Winning a match to advance tournament
typical_tension_triggers: Middle columns filling toward loss condition
Limited space available for blob placement
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time action puzzle with escalating pressure; tension increases as screen fills, relief comes from successful chain reactions; matches vary by opponent difficulty

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory matches establish basic blob matching and simple chain mechanics; early opponents (forest challengers from Kirby's Dream Land roster) provide moderate pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased opponent AI difficulty; larger rock volleys; requires proficient chain reaction execution; opponents begin trash-talking, signaling escalation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss opponents (Whispy Woods, Kracko, Meta Knight) demand expert-level chain management; final King Dedede confrontation represents peak difficulty
notable_spikes: Meta Knight match (known Kirby series rival)

notable_level_patterns.description: Single-player campaign progresses through sequential opponent matches, each with escalating difficulty; story framed as King Dedede's Avalanche Competition; opponents include classic Kirby series enemies
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Forest matches → Intermediate challengers → Boss gauntlet (Whispy Woods, Kracko, Meta Knight) → Fountain of Dreams final match

notable_level_patterns.description: Each match presents player screen and opponent screen side-by-side; vertical blob columns with same rules for both; symmetric board structure with asymmetric difficulty via AI
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All versus matches follow this layout

notable_level_patterns.description: Match lost when either middle column in top row fills with blob or rock; creates constant awareness of screen height and space management
